ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: BD_Group_By_for_Geolocation__c = TRUE && ( ISBLANK(BD_Formatted_Address_Field__c) || BD_Calculate_Formatted_Address__c = FALSE || NOT(ISPICKVAL(BD_Formatted_Address_Type__c, "Single Line")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can only Group By for GeoLocation when formatted address is enabled and "Single Line"
